ItacAcademyItem.Name: Puliti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Carding machine to work flax, with a skein of flax by it, and two iron scutchers used to clean and purify it, crossed above the machine
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The only reference to this Academy is in Bargagli, Dell`imprese, and according to him it was Attonito Intronato (Lelio Meretti) who devised the Academy emblem.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
